name: ai-auto-fix
description: Ask Grok to attempt a validated auto-fix on this PR.

name: ai-fix-applied
description: Grok auto-fix already pushed a commit to this PR.

name: ai-autopilot
description: Allow Grok to attempt automatic CI repair on this PR.

name: automerge
description: Allow merge automation after required checks and approvals pass.

name: grok-reviewed
description: Grok review automation has analyzed this PR.

name: grok-approved
description: Grok review found no blocking issues.

name: has-patch
description: Grok produced a high-confidence patch candidate for this PR.

name: needs-review
description: Human review is needed because automation found higher-risk issues.

name: security-issue
description: Security or privacy issue requires immediate attention.

name: threat-monitor
description: Issue or report generated by the scheduled threat monitor.

name: threat-high
description: Threat monitor found a high-severity actionable issue.

name: threat-medium
description: Threat monitor found a medium-severity actionable issue.

name: threat-fix-pr
description: Dependency fix PR generated from a high-confidence threat monitor finding.

name: dependencies
description: Dependency or ecosystem maintenance change.

name: automation
description: Workflow, bot, CI/CD, or repository automation change.

name: docs-only
description: Only docs and repo text changed.

name: large-pr
description: PR changes more than 20 files.

name: blocked-ci
description: PR is waiting on failed or pending CI.

name: blocked-review
description: PR is waiting on current human review or approval.

name: blocked-author
description: PR needs author action before it can merge.

name: merge-ready
description: PR is operationally ready for merge automation.

name: stale-review
description: Prior approvals are stale on an older head commit.

name: do-not-merge
description: Explicitly block merge automation.

name: work-in-progress
description: PR is not ready for merge automation.
